title: This n' That
description: This n' That is a Modpack I created after taking a long break from the Minecraft World in general. I came back to see 1.20.4, NeosForge and all this other stuff.....So..I made a Modpack with some new things.
body: I have been away from the Minecraft World for a few years now. I came back to see a ton of new things have changed. So I started piecing together a little bit of this and a little bit of that to try and cultivate a fun sandbox experience with no real goal other than to have fun and just enjoy yourself Solo or with Friends. The pack has Magic, Technology, Space, and a load of Adventure to be had. Enjoy yourself!
